name: happy-path-primary
task: Review this new tRPC router I added for a 'watchlist' feature. The files are at electron/domains/watchlist/router.ts and electron/domains/watchlist/service.ts. Check for security issues, TypeScript quality, and architecture compliance.
assertions: Response checks for hardcoded secrets or API keys in the reviewed files
Response checks for input validation on user-provided parameters (e.g., Zod schemas, Query validators)
Response checks for the presence of authentication/authorization on route handlers
Each identified issue includes a severity level (Critical, Warning, or Suggestion — or equivalent labels)
Each identified issue includes a specific file location (filename and line number or code reference)
